svg.text: My work (Zabbix HA, Galera, GLPI, Cisco, AD-DS)
GLPI → all 3 Galera nodes (shared DB backend via HAProxy)
Zabbix monitors all hosts via agents — general + service-specific metrics
HAProxy load-balances Zabbix frontend + DB queries · Keepalived manages VIP failover
All services connected to Cisco 2960 switch
